---
title: "Maria Marriott"
---

## Maria Marriott

**Dates:** (1844-1907)

### Description

elder daughter of the Rev. John Marriott

### Biography

Either she or her sister Mary Ann Marriott was Money Spinner, a particularly brilliant contributor to the Spider Society in the <i>Monthly Packet</i>. In the 1901 census they were living together at Eastleigh, and one of them must therefore be the Miss Marriott who organised the reprinting of <i>Last Heartsease Leaves</i> in 1900. [1851 census; birth, death index, 1881, 1891, 1901 censuses]

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 4th 1901
- Letter from Feb 13th 1881
- Letter from May 18th 1874

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
